_note: flightRouteCode maps to route groups. SHORT/VERYSHORT routes apply early-departure late-arrival logic for trips <= 3 days. All prices in INR unless otherwise noted.

outbound.note: Early morning — maximise your day in Goa

return.note: Late evening — squeeze every last minute out of Goa

KASHMIR.note: Best booked 3-4 weeks in advance for peak season

outbound.note: Earliest flight — full day in Kashmir
Best balance of timing and price
Full flat bed, lounge access included

return.note: Evening return — maximise your last day

outbound.note: Earliest arrival — catch morning Ganga Aarti
Complimentary meals and priority boarding

RAJASTHAN.note: Jaipur is gateway to the Rajasthan circuit

outbound.note: Full day in Jaipur on arrival
Best timing for fort visits in the morning
Lounge access, priority check-in

return.note: Evening return — see sunset at Nahargarh Fort

MALDIVES.note: Connect via Sri Lanka or direct — book 6 weeks ahead

outbound.note: Direct flight — best value for Maldives
Arrive in time for afternoon speedboat transfer
Business class with Dubai lounge — arrive refreshed

return.note: Last full morning at resort before checkout

THAILAND.note: BKK is hub — connect to Phuket or Krabi onward

outbound.note: Red-eye flight — save a night of accommodation
Comfortable timing with in-flight meal
World-class business class via Singapore

return.note: Evening departure — full last day in Bangkok

outbound.note: Early morning arrival — reach ghats before sunrise boat ride

return.note: Late night — attend Ganga Aarti before your flight

outbound.note: Earliest possible — arrive before rush for Darshan token

return.note: Evening return — full day for darshan and temple circuit

outbound.note: Morning departure — reach Mathura for the 9am Janmabhoomi Darshan opening

return.note: Evening return after attending Vrindavan evening aarti

outbound.note: Arrive before Taj opens — beat the crowds for sunrise photography

return.note: Night return — includes full day Taj + Agra Fort + Mehtab Bagh sunset

outbound.note: Early arrival at Mangalore + 2.5hr scenic drive — reach Coorg by noon

return.note: Late Mangalore departure — full last day in Coorg + drive to airport

outbound.note: Arrive Chennai 8:25am + 3hr drive — reach Pondicherry by noon

return.note: Drive Pondicherry–Chennai by 19:00, late departure back to Mumbai

LONAVALA_SHORT.note: Lonavala is a drive destination — no flight needed. We recommend a self-drive or cab. We include Pune (PNQ) flight as an option for those coming from distant cities.

outbound.note: Fly to Pune, then 1.5hr cab to Lonavala

return.note: Cab from Lonavala at 18:30 → Pune airport → night flight

RANTHAMBORE_SHORT.destination: Jaipur (JAI) then drive to Ranthambore (~3.5 hrs)

outbound.note: Early morning — arrive Jaipur, drive to Sawai Madhopur in time for afternoon safari

return.note: Drive Ranthambore–Jaipur after morning safari, catch evening flight

outbound.note: Early morning — reach Golden Temple for Amrit Vela 4am blessing next day, or explore by 9am today

return.note: Attend Wagah Border ceremony at 17:30, evening Golden Temple, then fly home

outbound.note: Arrive Hubli early — drive 3hrs, reach Hampi before noon for Virupaksha visit

return.note: Sunrise on Matanga Hill then drive Hampi–Hubli, catch evening flight

outbound.note: Early Coimbatore arrival + scenic drive to Ooty via Nilgiri ghat road

return.note: Drive Ooty–Coimbatore by 17:00, catch late flight

outbound.note: Early Bhubaneswar arrival, reach Puri by 11am for Jagannath morning darshan

return.note: Drive Puri–Bhubaneswar after Chilika Lake, late evening flight

outbound.note: Arrive Naples 14:20 — check in Positano by 17:00 for sunset

return.note: Drive Naples airport by 14:30 — leaves full 3rd day in Positano/Capri
